title: TNF-Alpha Target Area — Market Access Landscape
executive_summary_preview: Biosimilar competition is reshaping TNF-alpha market access at an accelerating pace. Three of the five major commercial payers have implemented biosimilar-first step therapy policies since January, and adalimumab biosimilar market share has crossed 40% nationally. This edition covers the latest formulary shifts, new interchangeability designations, and their implications for originator positioning.
